message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'ipv6_hopopt_jumbo_remove' sets signal field 'ipv6hdr.nexthdr', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=ipv6hdr;field=nexthdr;offset=6] [oracle:assert=ipv6hdr.nexthdr stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets nexthdr without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
